items.q: How do I connect to campus Wi-Fi?
items.a: Connect to the 'GreenfieldNet' Wi-Fi network and log in with your student email and portal password. If you face issues, visit the IT Helpdesk in the Library Building, Room 105.

items.q: How do I get my student email?
items.a: Your student email is automatically created as firstname.lastname@student.greenfield.edu. Login instructions are sent to your personal email within 48 hours of admission confirmation.

items.q: I forgot my portal password, what do I do?
items.a: Use the 'Forgot Password' link on the Student Portal login page, or visit the IT Helpdesk with your student ID for an in-person reset.
